task: Plan a trip to Tokyo for a week

agents.name: flights-agent
agents.role: Search and book round-trip flights, compare airlines and prices

agents.name: hotels-agent
agents.role: Find and reserve accommodation matching budget and location preferences

agents.name: calendar-agent
agents.role: Block travel dates, set reminders for check-in times and transfers

agents.name: research-agent
agents.role: Curate a day-by-day itinerary with sights, restaurants, and transport tips

agents.name: tasks-agent
agents.role: Create a pre-departure checklist: passport, travel insurance, currency

graph:
graph LR
  flights-agent --> calendar-agent
  hotels-agent --> calendar-agent
  calendar-agent --> research-agent
  research-agent --> tasks-agent

task: Set up a SaaS with auth and billing

agents.name: scaffolding-agent
agents.role: Bootstrap project structure, CI/CD, environment configuration

agents.name: auth-config-agent
agents.role: Configure OAuth providers, JWT tokens, session management

agents.name: stripe-integration-agent
agents.role: Set up products, pricing plans, webhooks, and billing portal

agents.name: deploy-agent
agents.role: Provision infrastructure, set up DNS, SSL, and production environment

graph:
graph LR
  scaffolding-agent --> auth-config-agent
  scaffolding-agent --> stripe-integration-agent
  auth-config-agent --> deploy-agent
  stripe-integration-agent --> deploy-agent

agents.name: emails-classify-agent
agents.role: Read and categorize each email by urgency, sender, and topic

agents.name: emails-action-agent
agents.role: Draft replies for messages requiring a response, archive noise

agents.name: tasks-create-agent
agents.role: Convert action items from emails into tracked tasks with due dates

graph:
graph LR
  emails-classify-agent --> emails-action-agent
  emails-classify-agent --> tasks-create-agent
  emails-action-agent --> tasks-create-agent

task: Research a company before a sales call

agents.name: web-research-agent
agents.role: Scrape company website, product pages, pricing, and recent news

agents.name: linkedin-agent
agents.role: Pull key decision-makers, roles, and recent activity from LinkedIn

agents.name: news-agent
agents.role: Fetch recent press mentions, funding rounds, and industry signals

agents.name: summary-agent
agents.role: Produce a one-page brief with talking points and risk flags

graph:
graph LR
  web-research-agent --> summary-agent
  linkedin-agent --> summary-agent
  news-agent --> summary-agent

agents.name: bank-sync-agent
agents.role: Pull all transactions from connected bank accounts and cards

agents.name: categorize-agent
agents.role: Assign expense categories using merchant names and spending patterns

agents.name: expense-agent
agents.role: Match receipts and expenses to submitted expense reports

agents.name: invoice-match-agent
agents.role: Cross-reference outgoing invoices with received payments

graph:
graph LR
  bank-sync-agent --> categorize-agent
  bank-sync-agent --> invoice-match-agent
  categorize-agent --> expense-agent
  expense-agent --> invoice-match-agent

agents.name: spec-agent
agents.role: Write a detailed spec from requirements: acceptance criteria, edge cases

agents.name: architecture-agent
agents.role: Design data models, API contracts, and component boundaries

agents.name: implementation-agent
agents.role: Write the production code following the architecture blueprint

agents.name: review-agent
agents.role: Run automated review: type safety, test coverage, security, performance

agents.name: docs-agent
agents.role: Generate changelog entry, API docs, and update README

graph:
graph LR
  spec-agent --> architecture-agent
  architecture-agent --> implementation-agent
  implementation-agent --> review-agent
  review-agent --> docs-agent

task: Compose and send a personalized cold-email batch

agents.name: research-agent
agents.role: Pull context on each recipient: role, company news, shared connections

agents.name: personalization-agent
agents.role: Generate unique opening lines and value props per recipient

agents.name: compose-agent
agents.role: Assemble full email drafts with subject lines and CTAs

agents.name: send-agent
agents.role: Send in batches with throttling, track opens and replies

graph:
graph LR
  research-agent --> personalization-agent
  personalization-agent --> compose-agent
  compose-agent --> send-agent

agents.name: calendar-agent
agents.role: Pull today's meetings, deadlines, and blocked time from calendar

agents.name: tasks-agent
agents.role: Surface overdue tasks, today's priorities, and blockers

agents.name: slack-search-agent
agents.role: Find overnight messages that need a response or decision

agents.name: format-agent
agents.role: Compose a concise standup summary: done, doing, blockers

graph:
graph LR
  calendar-agent --> format-agent
  tasks-agent --> format-agent
  slack-search-agent --> format-agent

agents.name: bank-sync-agent
agents.role: Fetch all transactions from bank and card accounts

agents.name: categorize-recurring-agent
agents.role: Identify recurring charges by merchant, amount, and cadence

agents.name: comparison-agent
agents.role: Flag duplicate tools, unused services, and price-increase candidates

agents.name: cancel-recommendations-agent
agents.role: Rank subscriptions by cancellation ROI, draft cancellation emails

graph:
graph LR
  bank-sync-agent --> categorize-recurring-agent
  categorize-recurring-agent --> comparison-agent
  comparison-agent --> cancel-recommendations-agent

agents.name: logs-agent
agents.role: Tail error logs around the incident window, extract stack traces

agents.name: metrics-agent
agents.role: Pull CPU, memory, latency, and error-rate graphs from the incident period

agents.name: recent-deploys-agent
agents.role: List commits and config changes deployed in the last 24 hours

agents.name: hypothesis-agent
agents.role: Correlate signals and generate ranked root-cause hypotheses

agents.name: fix-agent
agents.role: Propose the minimal code change or rollback to restore service

graph:
graph LR
  logs-agent --> hypothesis-agent
  metrics-agent --> hypothesis-agent
  recent-deploys-agent --> hypothesis-agent
  hypothesis-agent --> fix-agent

agents.name: accounts-agent
agents.role: Provision email, Slack, GitHub, and internal tool access

agents.name: calendar-agent
agents.role: Schedule intro meetings with key team members for week one

agents.name: docs-agent
agents.role: Share relevant wikis, runbooks, and architecture overviews

agents.name: tasks-agent
agents.role: Create onboarding checklist with week-one goals and check-ins

graph:
graph LR
  accounts-agent --> calendar-agent
  accounts-agent --> docs-agent
  calendar-agent --> tasks-agent
  docs-agent --> tasks-agent

agents.name: research-agent
agents.role: Gather existing literature, related posts, and factual sources

agents.name: outline-agent
agents.role: Structure the post: intro, sections, key takeaways, conclusion

agents.name: draft-agent
agents.role: Write full draft including code examples and diagrams

agents.name: review-agent
agents.role: Edit for clarity, check code accuracy, suggest headline variants

agents.name: publish-agent
agents.role: Format for CMS, add SEO metadata, schedule or publish

graph:
graph LR
  research-agent --> outline-agent
  outline-agent --> draft-agent
  draft-agent --> review-agent
  review-agent --> publish-agent
